basics.name: Federico Antonio Yarza Castillo
basics.label: Full Stack Developer with more than 8 years of experience in mobile and web software development
basics.summary: +8 years of experience as a Full Stack Web and Mobile Developer. Currently I am a Full Stack Developer at Epidata working on projects such as Gabrica Hub and ANII Postulaciones. I live in Valencia, Venezuela. I have worked in different environments: from accelerating the development of start-ups to leading teams in multinational companies, always focused on developing scalable and customized solutions that accelerate the digital transformation of organizations.

work.name: Epidata
work.summary: Development of enterprise solutions and management systems, using modern and efficient technologies. I led critical projects such as the Multi-Country Digital Hub for Gabrica and system modernization for ANII.
highlights: Led the migration of the PHP 5.3 to 8.2 ecosystem for ANII, improving performance and security
Designed and implemented a monorepo with Turborepo and pnpm workspaces for Gabrica Hub
Implemented Multi-Zone architecture with Next.js, unifying multiple applications under a single domain
Developed backend with NestJS 10.x applying Domain-Driven Design (DDD) and Hexagonal Architecture
Established testing strategies with minimum 80% coverage in shared packages
Implemented multi-country internationalization with next-intl for 5 countries (Argentina, Colombia, Chile, Uruguay, Paraguay)
Acted as technical mentor for the development team

work.name: Devinol S.A
work.summary: Mobile application development with focus on offline-first experience and optimization of geolocation functionalities for dating and service applications.
highlights: Designed and developed physical training application with offline-first approach
Optimized geolocation functionalities for dating application, improving accuracy and performance
Led complete refactoring of beverage search application for restaurants

work.name: Freelance
work.summary: Design and implementation of customized digital solutions for various business sectors, including ERP systems, e-commerce, analytical dashboards and educational platforms.
highlights: Development of web and mobile applications with integration to ERP and accounting systems
Implementation of e-commerce solutions with connection to multiple payment platforms
Creation of interfaces for satellite data management
Design of comprehensive system for social media management and automation
Creation of platform for student management with attendance and grades control

work.name: Rv. Medios C.A.
work.position: Full Stack Developer with Specialization in Enterprise Solutions
work.summary: Comprehensive web development combining modern frontend technologies (React.js, Vue.js) with robust backend solutions in Laravel and PHP. Specialization in enterprise systems and digital transformation.
highlights: Development of ARP accounting administrative system for Lecomp
Implementation of microservices architecture for wholesale system
Development of custom payment module for Prestashop
Digital transformation of companies: Rv. Medios, Vepaco, Cobertura y Tasas, Lecomp
Comprehensive web development with React.js, Vue.js, Laravel and PHP

education.institution: Facultad Experimental de Ciencias y Tecnología - Universidad de Carabobo

projects.name: Postulaciones ANII
projects.description: Proposal registration system for Uruguay's human capital
highlights: PHP 5.3 to 8.2 migration
Modern architecture with SOLID principles
Comprehensive form management system

projects.name: ANII Form Generator
projects.description: System responsible for the administration of different forms that are opened in application calls
highlights: Dynamic form administration
Application system

projects.name: Gabrica Hub
projects.description: Multi-country digital hub built with Next.js and NestJS to consolidate multiple business channels (B2C, B2B, MV, Ethics)
highlights: Monorepo with Turborepo
Multi-Zone architecture with Next.js
DDD + Hexagonal Architecture
Multi-country: Argentina, Colombia, Chile, Uruguay, Paraguay
Testing with 80%+ coverage

projects.name: Vanguard (Epidata)
projects.description: Multi-service repository based on microservices with a Java (Spring Boot) backend and a Next.js web frontend, including local Docker infrastructure and Kubernetes deployments.
highlights: Java 17 + Spring Boot 3.x microservices (Maven) with an API Gateway (Spring Cloud Gateway) and JWT filters
Next.js 15 frontend with a modern UI stack (Tailwind/Radix) and Bun-based build pipeline
Local development infrastructure via docker-compose (SQL Server, Redis, Seq) and per-service environment configuration
Per-service CI/CD with GitHub Actions: build, push to GHCR, and deploy to Kubernetes (self-hosted runners)
Automated code quality with SonarQube via dedicated workflows per service

projects.name: CVUy
projects.description: Maintenance and permanent updating of validated information about Uruguay's human capital capabilities
highlights: Human capital information management

projects.name: Fletamos
projects.description: React Native logistics mobile app for Latin America connecting cargo owners (shippers) with transporters for shipment management and real-time tracking.
highlights: React Native 0.70 + React Navigation 6; Redux Toolkit with persistence (redux-persist/thunk) and feature-based organization
Shipper and transporter roles: onboarding, vehicles/trailers, drivers, and a multi-step shipment creation flow (route, cargo, payments)
Map tracking with react-native-maps and geolocation; search, history, and shipment status
Real-time updates via Pusher/Laravel Echo; in-app chat; push notifications with Firebase and Notifee
Payments (Venezuela mobile payment, BS/USD transfers); Firebase Auth and Google Sign-In
UI with Native Base and twrnc utilities; Formik/Yup and react-hook-form; REST client with Axios

projects.name: Autokratic
projects.description: React Native (Expo) mobile app for an automotive marketplace connecting buyers and sellers: search, VIN scanning, AI recommendations, messaging, purchase flow, and a dedicated dealer dashboard.
highlights: React Native 0.71 + Expo ~48 + TypeScript; navigation with React Navigation
State with MobX, MobX-State-Tree and layered architecture (repository pattern, API layer with apisauce)
Buyers: marketplace with filters, VIN scan, favorites, payments and reports; dealers: inventory, publishing and lead management
Multi-language i18n (English, Spanish, Arabic, Korean) with RTL; light/dark theme and push notifications
Google and Apple sign-in, OTP verification; Jest tests and Detox E2E

projects.name: RZGroupSAS
projects.description: React Native (Expo) fleet management and transportation app for RZ Group: truckers, company clients, and administrators with services, vehicles, accounting, payments, and documentation.
highlights: React Native 0.71 + Expo 48 + TypeScript; role-based navigation with React Navigation (separate tab stacks per role)
State with MobX and MobX-State-Tree; layered architecture (API via apisauce with JWT)
Truckers: vehicles, services, expenses, and documents; companies: service monitoring, expenses, and payments; admin: user management and oversight
Accounting and charts (ECharts), high-performance lists (Flash List), documents and PDF; Expo modules (camera, print, sharing)
OTP authentication, role-based registration, Jest tests; optional E2E (e.g. Maestro)

projects.name: WhereMobile
projects.description: React Native (Expo) location-sharing app for contacts: “Where?” pings, interactive map, per-contact timeline, and push notifications.
highlights: React Native 0.69 + Expo ~46 + TypeScript; React Navigation (stack and tabs)
MobX and MobX-State-Tree (auth, user, contacts, location); UI with twrnc and Formik + Yup
Contact management with swipe actions; location pings and map via react-native-maps
Location history timeline per contact; push via expo-notifications; Expo location and contacts permissions
Distributed backend (main API + contacts and location microservices); Jest, Detox, and Storybook

projects.name: CoallyApp
projects.description: React Native (Expo) mobile app connecting students with educational and training opportunities, with AI-assisted support.
highlights: React Native 0.76 + Expo 52 + TypeScript; Ignite 10 boilerplate with a layered structure
State with MobX and MobX-State-Tree; persistence with MMKV and AsyncStorage
Dashboard, profile, training catalog, and opportunities modules; authentication and school selection
i18next across multiple languages (es, en, fr, hi, ar, ja, ko); light/dark theme and environment-based config
UI with twrnc, Reanimated, and bottom sheets; REST APIs via apisauce and Reactotron debugging

highlights: Mobile application
Geolocation
Dating system

projects.name: Fitlogger

highlights: Mobile application
Offline-first
Workout tracking
